svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="_cCzfOscWkVsvGrqJsf5"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="791" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR

 subgraph ENTRADAS[\"ENTRADAS Y CONFIGURACIÓN\"]
 S3[(\"S3 GOES-16\")]
 CJ[\"setup.json\"]
 CR[\"config_resampleo.json\"]
 CM[\"config_mapa.json\"]
 A[\"Grillas, logo y shapefiles\"]
 end

 subgraph FLUJO[\"PROCESAMIENTO PRINCIPAL\"]
 D[\"Descarga\"]
 B[(\"NetCDF B02, B05, B07, B08, B10 y B13\")]
 P[\"Procesamiento RGB\"]
 N[(\"NetCDF RGB\")]
 M[\"Mapa\"]
 PNG[(\"PNG\")]
 GIF[\"Constructor GIF\"]
 GF[(\"GIF\")]
 end

 subgraph DIAG[\"DIAGNÓSTICOS\"]
 B13[(\"Archivo NetCDF B13\")]
 DB[\"Diagnóstico B13\"]
 DO[(\"PNG térmicos<br/>JSON y CSV\")]
 DT[\"Diagnóstico temporal RGB\"]
 DC[(\"CSV temporal\")]
 end

 S3 --> D
 CJ --> D
 D --> B

 B --> P
 CR --> P
 P --> N

 N --> M
 CM --> M
 A --> M
 M --> PNG
 PNG --> GIF
 GIF --> GF

 B13 --> DB
 DB --> DO

 PNG --> DT
 DT --> DC

 Note1[\"El diagnóstico temporal<br/>no lee el GIF\"] -.-> DT

 classDef entrada fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#111827
 classDef proceso fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#111827
 classDef salida fill:#cffafe,stroke:#0891b2,stroke-width:2px,color:#111827
 classDef diag fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#111827
 classDef nota fill:#f3f4f6,stroke:#4b5563,stroke-width:1px,color:#111827

 class S3,CJ,CR,CM,A entrada
 class D,P,M,GIF proceso
 class B,N,PNG,GF salida
 class B13,DB,DO,DT,DC diag
 class Note1 nota",
 "config": null
